testsuite.name: RuleCacheService 单元测试

testcase.name: 应该清除指定规则缓存

testsuite.system-out: 2026-03-29 17:22:47.764 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - delete from rules r1_0 Hibernate: delete from rules r1_0 2026-03-29 17:22:47.765 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - insert into rules (created_at, created_by, enabled, groovy_script, opt_lock_version, rule_description, rule_key, rule_name, status, updated_at, updated_by, version, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) Hibernate: insert into rules (created_at, created_by, enabled, groovy_script, opt_lock_version, rule_description, rule_key, rule_name, status, updated_at, updated_by, version, id) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, default) 2026-03-29 17:22:47.766 [Test worker] DEBUG c.e.r.cache.RuleCacheService - 缓存未命中，从数据库加载规则: ruleKey=evict-test-rule 2026-03-29 17:22:47.768 [Test worker] DEBUG org.hibernate.SQL - select r1_0.id, r1_0.created_at, r1_0.created_by, r1_0.enabled, r1_0.groovy_script, r1_0.opt_lock_version, r1_0.rule_description, r1_0.rule_key, r1_0.rule_name, r1_0.status, r1_0.updated_at, r1_0.updated_by, r1_0.version from rules r1_0 where r1_0.rule_key=?
